subject: [PATCH v5 11/21] zswap: move zswap entry management to the virtual swap descriptor

2026-03-20.patch_summary: This patch moves zswap entry management from the zswap tree to the virtual swap descriptor, eliminating lock contention between zswap entries. The change re-partitions the zswap pool by virtual swap cluster and introduces new functions for storing, loading, and erasing zswap entries in the swap descriptor. This approach simplifies the management of zswap entries and improves performance by reducing lock contention.
